deployment_notes: Treat current-deployment as the current website/default branch unless GitHub repository settings are changed.
The deployment branch was renamed to current-deployment on 2026-05-06.
The public site is static GitHub Pages content served from the docs directory with docs/CNAME set to aliusresearch.org.
Older GitHub Pages deployment history may mention optimized-v1 or redesign-v2 from before the branch rename; do not assume those are still canonical without checking repository settings.
